name: Avatar Grid Tile
description: Square card with a circular avatar inside, name underneath, and an optional new-match dot indicator. The repeating tile inside a matches-grid layout. Differs from card-grid (rectangular content cards) and presence-avatars (horizontal stack of presence indicators) by combining a square card surface with a circular photo and a single-line name — optimized for grid-of-people displays.

standard.description: Square card with circular 80px avatar centered above a single-line name. Optional violet new-match dot at top-right of the avatar. Used as the repeating tile in a matches-grid.

with-presence.description: Includes a small green online-status dot at bottom-right of the avatar (like Slack/Messenger presence). Otherwise identical to standard.

compact.description: Smaller variant — 56px avatar, no card padding. Used in dense grids or sub-lists.

visual_brief: A square-ish card (intrinsic size, expands to grid cell) with the swipecircle-grid-tile decorator: white surface, 20px border-radius, 16px padding, soft coral-tinted shadow, flex-col items-center with 8px gap. At the top: AvatarFrame — a 80×80 circular avatar with the swipecircle-photo-frame decorator (coral outer ring 3px, cream inner gap 2px, soft shadow). The Avatar img inside fills the frame (object-fit cover). At top-right of the AvatarFrame: a NewMatchDot — a 12×12 violet circle (var(--d-secondary)) with a 2px white inner border, positioned absolute (top: -2px, right: -2px). Visible only when data-new=true. On first appearance, animates: scale 0→1.2→1 + opacity 0→1 over 320ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) — pulses in. Optionally pulses gently (scale 1→1.06→1 over 1.6s ease-in-out infinite) until the user views the match. In the with-presence preset: a PresenceDot at bottom-right of the AvatarFrame — 10×10 green circle (var(--d-success)) with white border, positioned absolute (bottom: 2px, right: 2px), visible only when data-online=true. Below the AvatarFrame: Name — single-line text, font-size 14px, font-weight 600, color var(--d-text), text-align center, max-width 100% with text-overflow ellipsis. Optional TimestampLabel below name (visible on hover or always per preset config) — 'Active 2h ago' style, font-size 11px, color var(--d-text-muted). On hover: the tile lifts (translateY -2px), the shadow intensifies, and the AvatarFrame's outer ring increases coral saturation slightly. Press: scale(0.97) for 80ms, spring back over 200ms. Click navigates to that user's profile (`/u/:userId`) — emits 'open-profile' event. Each tile is a single tap target — the entire card is clickable, not just the avatar or name.

layout_hints.container: square-ish card with circular avatar inside
layout_hints.size: Default 144×160px or grid-cell-fill — fills the container
layout_hints.tap_target: Entire tile is the tap target (not just avatar) — easier on mobile

slots.tile: Outer card. Position relative (so absolute children anchor here). Flex-col, items-center, gap 8px, padding 16px. Border-radius 20px. Background var(--d-surface). Applies swipecircle-grid-tile decorator. Cursor pointer. data-new='true|false'. data-online='true|false'. Click navigates to user's profile. Carries role='link' or wraps an <a> element pointing to /u/{userId}.
slots.avatar-frame: Position relative (anchors PresenceDot and NewMatchDot). 80×80 (standard) or 56×56 (compact). Applies swipecircle-photo-frame decorator: rounded-full, padding 3px, gradient coral-to-accent border. Box-shadow soft.
slots.avatar: Img inside the frame. width 100%, height 100%, border-radius 9999px (matches frame), object-fit cover, object-position center. Default placeholder: a soft peach gradient with a 24px User Lucide icon centered.
slots.presence-dot: Conditional in with-presence preset. Position absolute, bottom: 2px, right: 2px. 10×10. Border-radius 9999px. Background var(--d-success). Border 2px solid var(--d-surface) (creates a clean cutout effect). Visible only when data-online=true.
slots.new-match-dot: Position absolute, top: -2px, right: -2px. 12×12. Border-radius 9999px. Background var(--d-secondary) (violet match accent). Border 2px solid var(--d-surface). Visible only when data-new=true. On first render: scales 0→1.2→1 + opacity 0→1 over 320ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1). Optional gentle pulse animation (scale 1→1.06→1 over 1.6s ease-in-out infinite) until viewed.
slots.name: Single-line text below the avatar. Font-size 14px, font-weight 600, color var(--d-text), text-align center, white-space nowrap, overflow hidden, text-overflow ellipsis, max-width 100%.
slots.timestamp-label: Optional secondary line below name. Font-size 11px, font-weight 500, color var(--d-text-muted). Format examples: 'Matched today', 'Active 2h ago', 'New match!'. Visible per preset config — always in standard, on-hover only in compact.

keyboard: Enter or Space: activate (navigate to profile)
Arrow keys: navigate between tiles in the grid (handled by parent grid's roving tabindex)
accessibility.focus_management: Each tile is a focusable link. The new-match indicator is announced via aria-label suffix when data-new=true. Focus ring uses the swipecircle-pill decorator's primary color outline.

mobile.notes: 3-column grid on narrow viewports. Avatar 64×64. Reduced padding (12px).

desktop.notes: 5-column grid in the 480px max-width app column. Hover state active (lift + glow).

micro.tile-press: scale(0.97) for 80ms, spring back to scale(1) over 200ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
micro.new-match-pulse: scale 1→1.06→1 over 1.6s ease-in-out infinite (gentle attention-grabber, until viewed)
micro.avatar-frame-hover: outer ring saturation shift +10% over 200ms ease-out

transitions.grid-stagger: When the grid first appears, tiles enter with a stagger: opacity 0 + scale 0.95 → opacity 1 + scale 1 over 320ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) with a 40ms delay between each tile. Total stagger time depends on tile count.

composition.AvatarGridTile: Tile(rounded-2xl, swipecircle-grid-tile, flex-col, items-center, gap-2, padding-4) > [AvatarFrame + Name + TimestampLabel(conditional)]
composition.AvatarFrame: Div(relative, 80px-circle, swipecircle-photo-frame) > [Avatar(filling) + PresenceDot(absolute, conditional) + NewMatchDot(absolute, conditional)]
composition.Name: Span(text-sm, font-semibold, single-line, ellipsis)
